traits.name: Psychic Resistance
traits.description: The creature has resistance to psychic damage.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.description: The creature has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the creature's allies is within 5 feet of the target and the ally isn't incapacitated.

traits.name: Keen Smell
traits.description: The creature has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

traits.name: Radiant Weapons
traits.description: The creature's weapon attacks are magical and deal an extra {damage} radiant damage on a hit.

traits.name: Immutable Form
traits.description: The creature is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

traits.name: Frightful Presence
traits.description: Each creature of the dragon's choice within {distance} of it must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute.

traits.name: Fire Form
traits.description: The creature can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing. A creature that touches it or hits it with a melee attack takes {damage} fire damage.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: The creature has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Devil's Sight
traits.description: Magical darkness doesn't impede the creature's darkvision.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.description: The creature counts as one size larger when determining carrying capacity and the weight it can push, drag, or lift.

traits.name: Regeneration
traits.description: The creature regains {hp} hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point.

traits.name: Amorphous
traits.description: The creature can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

traits.name: False Appearance
traits.description: While the creature remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal plant of its kind.

traits.name: Undead Fortitude
traits.description: If damage reduces the creature to 0 hit points, it must make a Constitution saving throw with a DC of 5 + the damage taken, unless the damage is radiant or from a critical hit. On a success, the creature drops to 1 hit point instead.
